name: Invalid Search Handling
description: 1. Launch browser → Amazon SG. 2. Search for "asdasd123!@#". 3. Wait for results page. 4. Validate "no results" or limited results message appears. 5. Close browser.

analysis.phase1Message: locator.click: Error: strict mode violation: getByRole('button', { name: 'Go' }) resolved to 2 elements: 1) aka getByRole('button', { name: 'Go', exact: true }) 2) … aka getByLabel('Open All Categories Menu') Call log: [2m- waiting for getByRole('button', { name: 'Go' })[22m ",
